text.title: django-quality-queries Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: order-list endpoint with 1001 queries reduced to 3 via a selector + assertNumQueries lock.

example.title: N+1 in views.py — 1 + N queries for N orders
example.note: For 500 orders this issues ~2001 queries. p95 latency > 4s.

example.title: Selector + assertNumQueries lock
example.note: 3 queries: 1 orders + select_related JOIN, 1 items prefetch, 1 products prefetch. Regression-locked. p95 latency drops to ≈80 ms.
